overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a red and white spacesuit exploring a dimly lit, rustic interior with stone walls and wooden furniture. The character moves from a bedroom area through a sliding wooden door into a narrow corridor with industrial piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic bedroom with stone walls and wooden furniture

agents.ego_description: moving around the bedroom, examining the bed and walls near the wooden door

entered.detail: bed with dark green cover and white pillows against the far wall
large landscape painting depicting a sunset over water on the far wall
heavy wooden sliding door with metal handle on the right wall
small desk with illuminated lamp and papers on the left side
rough-hewn stone wall texture with wooden trim

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit bedroom with warm artificial lighting, featuring a bed with a dark cover, a desk with a lamp, and rough stone walls. A large sunset painting hangs on the far wall above the bed, and a heavy wooden sliding door is visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition between bedroom and hallway

events.description: character opens the wooden sliding door revealing the adjacent hallway

agents.ego_description: opening the wooden sliding door and preparing to exit the room

entered.detail: open doorway revealing a bathroom area with sink and towels

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and opens the wooden sliding door, transitioning from the bedroom toward a hallway. The door slides open to reveal a bathroom area with a sink and towels, while the desk and painting fall behind out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with industrial piping and furniture

events.description: fully enters the hallway with exposed stone walls and industrial ceiling pipes

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow corridor past a sofa toward a wooden table at the far end

entered.detail: rough stone walls lining both sides of the narrow hallway
metal shelf with folded yellow towels mounted on the stone wall
modern gray sofa against the left wall of the corridor
wooden table with items on it at the end of the hallway
decorative tapestry hanging on the left wall above the sofa

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow corridor with exposed stone walls and industrial piping overhead. A gray sofa sits against the left wall beneath a decorative tapestry, while a towel shelf is mounted on the right. The character moves toward a wooden table at the far end of the hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy, dimly lit bedroom into a narrow, industrial-style corridor. It begins in a room with warm artificial lighting, focusing on a bed and a sunset painting against rough stone walls. As the character approaches and opens a heavy wooden sliding door, the scene shifts away from the bedroom and briefly reveals a bathroom area with a sink and towels. The camera then follows the character as they move deeper into a narrow hallway characterized by exposed stone and overhead industrial piping. This progression continues past a gray sofa and a decorative tapestry before finally arriving at a wooden table at the far end of the corridor.
